query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%معلم%' OR title LIKE '%مرشد%' OR title LIKE '%دليل%' OR title LIKE '%teacher%' OR title LIKE '%Teacher%' OR title LIKE '%guide%' OR title LIKE '%Guide%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as teacher_guides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN extracted_content IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(extracted_content) > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_content,
  SUM(CASE WHEN extracted_content IS NULL OR LENGTH(extracted_content) < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as needs_content
FROM pedagogical_references;
